title: convolvulus siculus subsp. agrestis
intro: Convolvulus siculus subsp. agrestis is a plant species commonly known as wild morning glory, a perennial vine native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive system function. In herbal preparations, Convolvulus siculus subsp. agrestis is often used as a tea, tincture, or infusion to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
